positive: A vibrant, mystical forest creature, combining the sleek silhouette of a wolf and the iridescent scales of a serpent, standing alertly in a forest clearing at dawn. The creature has glowing sapphire eyes and fur/scales that transition from deep indigo to emerald green. The composition is centered, featuring clean lines and strong contrast between the illuminated edges and the dappled, moody forest backdrop. Studio-quality artwork, highly detailed illustration, vector art influence, graphic novel style, flat color blocking, strong rim lighting, magical realism, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Aspect ratio 1:1.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, blurry, grainy, artifacts, low resolution, extra limbs, poor anatomy, cartoon, messy, dirty, faded, grayscale, multiple subjects, people
